---
output: github_document
always_allow_html: true
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.Rmd. Please edit that file -->

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "man/figures/README-",
  out.width = "100%"
)
```

# PenguinDive

The goal of PenguinDive is to dive into the Palmer penguins dataset,
    aimed at teaching basic statistical concepts and ecological data exploration.

## Installation

Install the development version of PenguinDive like this:

```{r, eval=FALSE}
# install.packages("pak")
# pak::pak("Vinanden/PenguinDive")

# or:

# install.packages("remotes")
# remotes::install_github("Vinanden/PenguinDive")
```

## Launching

Launch the PenguinDive app with:

```{r example, eval=FALSE}
library(PenguinDive)
PenguinDive::run_app()
```
